hero_banner.title: 'Reliable Local Services At Your Doorstep'
hero_banner.subtitle: 'Fast. Trusted. Verified.'
hero_banner.image_treatment: Absolute positioned illustration/photo on the right side, overlapping slightly at the bottom. Use transparent PNG or masked image.

service_categories.layout: Grid of 5 items, flex-row wrap. Items are 30% width.
service_categories.item_style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 items-center shadow-sm border border-slate-50

bottom_navigation.layout: Absolute bottom-0 w-full flex-row justify-around items-center bg-white pt-3 pb-safe border-t border-slate-100

worker_card.layout: flex-row items-center bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100
worker_card.badge: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold
worker_card.action_button: flex-1 bg-blue-50 py-3 rounded-xl items-center justify-center text-blue-700 font-semibold

booking_form.input: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 font-medium

pin_input.box: w-14 h-14 bg-slate-50 border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-2xl items-center justify-center

implementation_notes.native_styling: Use NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native). Do not use web-only CSS properties like 'hover' on mobile elements; rely on 'active' state via TouchableOpacity.
implementation_notes.icons: Use lucide-react-native for all system icons.
implementation_notes.navigation: Use Expo Router for file-based routing and deep linking.
implementation_notes.safe_area: Ensure SafeAreaView is used to prevent overlap with iOS dynamic island and Android status bar.
implementation_notes.animations: Use React Native Reanimated for subtle scale-in on the worker card and bottom sheet spring animations.
